items.name: Statue Staff of Stony Justice
items.description: Your enemies will have a heart of stone.  Because you've petrified them!  Petrifies your enemies 1/10 times.

items.name: Bombastic Sword
items.description: Your foes will definitely see it coming, but you're so fast it doesn't matter!

items.name: Positronic Arm Cannon
items.description: From the research labs of scientifically advanced Robloxia comes this attachable cannon to blasts your opponents with not 1, not 2 but 3 fully charged rotating positron charges

items.name: Battle Slingshot
items.description: Battle your foes with this rapid firing slingshot!

items.name: Korblox - Fallen's Spine Blade
items.description: In the heat of battle, when the weapon fails him, a true Korblox warrior is not afraid of ripping his spine apart and slashing through his adversaries.

items.name: Ocean Samurai
items.description: The rolling ocean encounters no resistance.

items.name: Spider Horde
items.description: Whats better than one spider? Why not three!?

items.name: Hanukkah Menorah
items.description: Celebrating the festival of lights in style!

items.name: Ne'Kotikoz Phaser
items.description: The Ne'Kotikoz will ask you to move politely, then they'll pull out the Phasers.  Trust me, you don't want them to pull out the Phasers.

items.name: Sword Punch
items.description: Wear this mighty blade on your arm and strike your foes with the mighty punch of many pointy things!

items.name: Zephanon Phaser and Shield
items.description: In a world where darkness surrounds, there is only one way to remain safe.  This phaser and shield set will serve you well.

items.name: Wizard Flight Spell
items.description: Take flight with this magic spell!  Jump to begin flight; control using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D', or the arrow keys. Hit the space bar again to stop flying.

items.name: Regular Carpet
items.description: You walk past a rug shop, where a clerk tries to sell you a magic carpet.  You tell him you don't want a magic carpet today. He then admits to you that he was lying, and this really is just a regular carpet. His whole life is a lie. Then he starts crying. You kind of have to buy it after that.  This is a regular carpet and it literally does nothing.

items.name: Flock of Attack Seagulls
items.description: Summoning this flock of attack seagulls will have your enemies running, running so far away, running all night and day.  Click on enemies for them to swoop down and bite at them! They do 5 damage per hit.

items.name: Orinthian Sword and Shield
items.description: Slash enemies with your futuristic sword or stop them dead in their tracks with a shield bash!  Activate the shield bash stun with a right click to stun enemies for 2 seconds.  When enemies are stunned, you can do extra damage!

items.name: Ultraviolet Laser Oculus
items.description: Charge up your eye laser to do maximum laser firing damage to your enemies.  Always wanted an eye that could shoot lasers?  Today is your day!

items.name: Magic Lamp
items.description: Rub the lamp, and a genie appears to grant you a wish.

items.name: First Class Fencing Sword
items.description: Fence your way to a gold medal with this first class sword.

items.name: Mega Mallet
items.description: Get ready to lower the BOOM! Click to swing at enemies; dealing anywhere from 20 to 30 damage. Double click to slam the mallet against the ground - dealing 80 damage to anybody hit.

items.name: Vilethorn
items.description: Wrap your enemies in the vilest of thorns.

items.name: Burger Launcher
items.description: Fire deadly burgers and fries at your foes!  They'll take some serious burger damage (25 points per hit) and massive fry devastation (35 damage per hit)!

items.name: Snowflake Shield and Sword
items.description: Take up arms against the frozen winter wind!

items.name: Galactic Forcefield Glove
items.description: Charge the glove to blast your enemies!  Foes beware - touching someone while they charge the glove will result in immediate shock!

items.name: Sci-Fi MedVac 4300
items.description: Heal yourself and your teammates with this Sci Fi MedVac

items.name: Blizzard Wand
items.description: Quit wishing for snow and make it happen...with this wand!    Also shoots icy blizzard balls at anyone near you.

items.name: A Very Special Monster
items.description: He has big big plans, but small small teeth.

items.name: Horde of Attack Crabs
items.description: Summon five tiny crabs which will run after enemies and pinch them with their claws dealing damage! They'll chase anybody nearby and you click on.

items.name: Z Ray Gun
items.description: Hit an opponent twice and he'll go to sleep.

items.name: Slingshot
items.description: It's a sure shot everytime!  Well only if you've got great aim....
